title: Movie Trailer Synopsis
scenario: Write a synopsis of a recent blockbuster movie's plot, including the main characters and setting. The summary should be 1-2 paragraphs long, written in the third person.
constraints: Should be written in the third person

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary does not include spoilers and is written in the third person.
Verify that the summary includes the main characters and setting.
Check if the tone of the summary matches a neutral tone.
